mapper.sql: PATIENT_ID, VISIT_ID, DEPT_ADMISSION_TO, ADMISSION_DATE_TIME, DEPT_DISCHARGE_FROM, DISCHARGE_DATE_TIME, OCCUPATION, MARITAL_STATUS, IDENTITY, ARMED_SERVICES, DUTY, UNIT_IN_CONTRACT, CHARGE_TYPE, WORKING_STATUS, INSURANCE_TYPE, INSURANCE_NO, SERVICE_AGENCY, MAILING_ADDRESS, ZIP_CODE, NEXT_OF_KIN, RELATIONSHIP, NEXT_OF_KIN_ADDR, NEXT_OF_KIN_ZIPCODE, NEXT_OF_KIN_PHONE, PATIENT_CLASS, ADMISSION_CAUSE, CONSULTING_DATE, PAT_ADM_CONDITION, CONSULTING_DOCTOR, ADMITTED_BY, EMER_TREAT_TIMES, ESC_EMER_TIMES, SPEC_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS, FIRST_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS, AUTOPSY_INDICATOR, BLOOD_TYPE, BLOOD_TYPE_RH, BLOOD_TRAN_TIMES, BLOOD_TRAN_VOL, BLOOD_TRAN_REACT_TIMES, ALERGY_DRUGS, ADVERSE_REACTION_DRUGS, MR_VALUE, MR_QUALITY, FOLLOW_INDICATOR, FOLLOW_INTERVAL, FOLLOW_INTERVAL_UNITS, DIRECTOR, ATTENDING_DOCTOR, DOCTOR_IN_CHARGE, DISCHARGE_DISPOSITION, TOTAL_COSTS, TOTAL_PAYMENTS, CATALOG_DATE, CATALOGER, SERIOUS_COND_DAYS, CRITICAL_COND_DAYS, ICU_DAYS, CCU_DAYS, SECOND_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS, INFUSION_REACT_TIMES, DECUBITAL_ULCER_TIMES, TOP_UNIT, SERVICE_SYSTEM_INDICATOR, INTERNAL_NO, IDENTITY_CLASS, HBSAG_INDICATOR, HCV_AB_INDICATOR, HIV_AB_INDICATOR, CHIEF_DOCTOR, ADVANCED_STUDIES_DOCTOR, PRACTICE_DOCTOR_OF_GRADUATE, PRACTICE_DOCTOR, DOCTOR_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY, NURSE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY, DATE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY, FIRST_CASE_INDICATOR, THIRD_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS, X_EXAM_NO, MEDICAL_PAY_WAY, TRAINING_INJURY_INDICATOR, NURSE_MR_COMMIT, NURSE_MR_COMMIT_TIME, ABNORMAL, SPECIAL_VALUE_INDICATOR, MR_DESC, HEIGHT, WEIGHT, PATIENT_CONDITION, HOSPITAL_CODE, ZYLSH, CARD_NO, INFECT_INDICATOR, MR_INFECT_REPORT, HEALTH_LEVEL, SECURITY_TYPE_CODE, ACP_MEDINS_NAME, DAYS_RINP_FLAG, DAYS_RINP_PUP, VENT_USED_DAY, VENT_USED_HOUR, VENT_USED_MIN, BEFORE_COMA_DAY, BEFORE_COMA_HOUR, BEFORE_COMA_MIN, AFTER_COMA_DAY, AFTER_COMA_HOUR, AFTER_COMA_MIN, NWB_ADM_TYPE, MUL_NWB_BIR_WT, MUL_NWB_ADM_WT, STATUS, UNPANNED_READMISSION, BODY_HEIGHT, BODY_WEIGHT
mapper.insert: insert into PAT_VISIT (PATIENT_ID, VISIT_ID, DEPT_ADMISSION_TO, ADMISSION_DATE_TIME, DEPT_DISCHARGE_FROM, DISCHARGE_DATE_TIME, OCCUPATION, MARITAL_STATUS, IDENTITY, ARMED_SERVICES, DUTY, UNIT_IN_CONTRACT, CHARGE_TYPE, WORKING_STATUS, INSURANCE_TYPE, INSURANCE_NO, SERVICE_AGENCY, MAILING_ADDRESS, ZIP_CODE, NEXT_OF_KIN, RELATIONSHIP, NEXT_OF_KIN_ADDR, NEXT_OF_KIN_ZIPCODE, NEXT_OF_KIN_PHONE, PATIENT_CLASS, ADMISSION_CAUSE, CONSULTING_DATE, PAT_ADM_CONDITION, CONSULTING_DOCTOR, ADMITTED_BY, EMER_TREAT_TIMES, ESC_EMER_TIMES, SPEC_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS, FIRST_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS, AUTOPSY_INDICATOR, BLOOD_TYPE, BLOOD_TYPE_RH, BLOOD_TRAN_TIMES, BLOOD_TRAN_VOL, BLOOD_TRAN_REACT_TIMES, ALERGY_DRUGS, ADVERSE_REACTION_DRUGS, MR_VALUE, MR_QUALITY, FOLLOW_INDICATOR, FOLLOW_INTERVAL, FOLLOW_INTERVAL_UNITS, DIRECTOR, ATTENDING_DOCTOR, DOCTOR_IN_CHARGE, DISCHARGE_DISPOSITION, TOTAL_COSTS, TOTAL_PAYMENTS, CATALOG_DATE, CATALOGER, SERIOUS_COND_DAYS, CRITICAL_COND_DAYS, ICU_DAYS, CCU_DAYS, SECOND_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS, INFUSION_REACT_TIMES, DECUBITAL_ULCER_TIMES, TOP_UNIT, SERVICE_SYSTEM_INDICATOR, INTERNAL_NO, IDENTITY_CLASS, HBSAG_INDICATOR, HCV_AB_INDICATOR, HIV_AB_INDICATOR, CHIEF_DOCTOR, ADVANCED_STUDIES_DOCTOR, PRACTICE_DOCTOR_OF_GRADUATE, PRACTICE_DOCTOR, DOCTOR_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY, NURSE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY, DATE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY, FIRST_CASE_INDICATOR, THIRD_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS, X_EXAM_NO, MEDICAL_PAY_WAY, TRAINING_INJURY_INDICATOR, NURSE_MR_COMMIT, NURSE_MR_COMMIT_TIME, ABNORMAL, SPECIAL_VALUE_INDICATOR, MR_DESC, HEIGHT, WEIGHT, PATIENT_CONDITION, HOSPITAL_CODE, ZYLSH, CARD_NO, INFECT_INDICATOR, MR_INFECT_REPORT, HEALTH_LEVEL, SECURITY_TYPE_CODE, ACP_MEDINS_NAME, DAYS_RINP_FLAG, DAYS_RINP_PUP, VENT_USED_DAY, VENT_USED_HOUR, VENT_USED_MIN, BEFORE_COMA_DAY, BEFORE_COMA_HOUR, BEFORE_COMA_MIN, AFTER_COMA_DAY, AFTER_COMA_HOUR, AFTER_COMA_MIN, NWB_ADM_TYPE, MUL_NWB_BIR_WT, MUL_NWB_ADM_WT, STATUS, UNPANNED_READMISSION, BODY_HEIGHT, BODY_WEIGHT) values (#{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visitId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{deptAdmissionTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admissionDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deptDischargeFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dischargeDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{occupation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{armedServices,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{duty,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitInContract,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chargeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workingStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{insuranceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insuranceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceAgency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zipCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextOfKin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextOfKinAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextOfKinZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nextOfKinPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{patientClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admissionCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{consultingDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{patAdmCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{consultingDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admittedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emerTreatTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{escEmerTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{specLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{firstLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{autopsyIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{bloodType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bloodTypeRh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bloodTranTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{bloodTranVol,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{bloodTranReactTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{alergyDrugs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adverseReactionDrugs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mrValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mrQuality,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{followIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{followInterval,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{followIntervalUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{director,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attendingDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doctorInCharge,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dischargeDisposition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalCosts,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{totalPayments,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{catalogDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{cataloger,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seriousCondDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{criticalCondDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{icuDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ccuDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{secondLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{infusionReactTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{decubitalUlcerTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{topUnit,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{serviceSystemIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{internalNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{identityClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hbsagIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{hcvAbIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{hivAbIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{chiefDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{advancedStudiesDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{practiceDoctorOfGraduate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstCaseIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{thirdLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{xExamNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{medicalPayWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainingInjuryIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{nurseMrCommit,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{nurseMrCommitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{abnormal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialValueIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{mrDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{height,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{weight,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{patientCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hospitalCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zylsh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{infectIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{mrInfectReport,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{healthLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{securityTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acpMedinsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{daysRinpFlag,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{daysRinpPup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ventUsedDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ventUsedHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ventUsedMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{beforeComaDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{beforeComaHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{beforeComaMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{afterComaDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{afterComaHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{afterComaMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{nwbAdmType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mulNwbBirWt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mulNwbAdmWt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{unpannedReadmission,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{bodyHeight,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{bodyWeight,jdbcType=NUMERIC})

insert into PAT_VISIT
PATIENT_ID,
VISIT_ID,
DEPT_ADMISSION_TO,
ADMISSION_DATE_TIME,
DEPT_DISCHARGE_FROM,
DISCHARGE_DATE_TIME,
OCCUPATION,
MARITAL_STATUS,
IDENTITY,
ARMED_SERVICES,
DUTY,
UNIT_IN_CONTRACT,
CHARGE_TYPE,
WORKING_STATUS,
INSURANCE_TYPE,
INSURANCE_NO,
SERVICE_AGENCY,
MAILING_ADDRESS,
ZIP_CODE,
NEXT_OF_KIN,
RELATIONSHIP,
NEXT_OF_KIN_ADDR,
NEXT_OF_KIN_ZIPCODE,
NEXT_OF_KIN_PHONE,
PATIENT_CLASS,
ADMISSION_CAUSE,
CONSULTING_DATE,
PAT_ADM_CONDITION,
CONSULTING_DOCTOR,
ADMITTED_BY,
EMER_TREAT_TIMES,
ESC_EMER_TIMES,
SPEC_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS,
FIRST_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS,
AUTOPSY_INDICATOR,
BLOOD_TYPE,
BLOOD_TYPE_RH,
BLOOD_TRAN_TIMES,
BLOOD_TRAN_VOL,
BLOOD_TRAN_REACT_TIMES,
ALERGY_DRUGS,
ADVERSE_REACTION_DRUGS,
MR_VALUE,
MR_QUALITY,
FOLLOW_INDICATOR,
FOLLOW_INTERVAL,
FOLLOW_INTERVAL_UNITS,
DIRECTOR,
ATTENDING_DOCTOR,
DOCTOR_IN_CHARGE,
DISCHARGE_DISPOSITION,
TOTAL_COSTS,
TOTAL_PAYMENTS,
CATALOG_DATE,
CATALOGER,
SERIOUS_COND_DAYS,
CRITICAL_COND_DAYS,
ICU_DAYS,
CCU_DAYS,
SECOND_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS,
INFUSION_REACT_TIMES,
DECUBITAL_ULCER_TIMES,
TOP_UNIT,
SERVICE_SYSTEM_INDICATOR,
INTERNAL_NO,
IDENTITY_CLASS,
HBSAG_INDICATOR,
HCV_AB_INDICATOR,
HIV_AB_INDICATOR,
CHIEF_DOCTOR,
ADVANCED_STUDIES_DOCTOR,
PRACTICE_DOCTOR_OF_GRADUATE,
PRACTICE_DOCTOR,
DOCTOR_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY,
NURSE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY,
DATE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY,
FIRST_CASE_INDICATOR,
THIRD_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS,
X_EXAM_NO,
MEDICAL_PAY_WAY,
TRAINING_INJURY_INDICATOR,
NURSE_MR_COMMIT,
NURSE_MR_COMMIT_TIME,
ABNORMAL,
SPECIAL_VALUE_INDICATOR,
MR_DESC,
HEIGHT,
WEIGHT,
PATIENT_CONDITION,
HOSPITAL_CODE,
ZYLSH,
CARD_NO,
INFECT_INDICATOR,
MR_INFECT_REPORT,
HEALTH_LEVEL,
SECURITY_TYPE_CODE,
ACP_MEDINS_NAME,
DAYS_RINP_FLAG,
DAYS_RINP_PUP,
VENT_USED_DAY,
VENT_USED_HOUR,
VENT_USED_MIN,
BEFORE_COMA_DAY,
BEFORE_COMA_HOUR,
BEFORE_COMA_MIN,
AFTER_COMA_DAY,
AFTER_COMA_HOUR,
AFTER_COMA_MIN,
NWB_ADM_TYPE,
MUL_NWB_BIR_WT,
MUL_NWB_ADM_WT,
STATUS,
UNPANNED_READMISSION,
BODY_HEIGHT,
BODY_WEIGHT,

#{deptAdmissionTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{admissionDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

#{cardNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{beforeComaMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{afterComaDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{afterComaHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{afterComaMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC},

#{mulNwbAdmWt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{unpannedReadmission,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{bodyHeight,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{bodyWeight,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
mapper.update:
update PAT_VISIT
DEPT_ADMISSION_TO = #{deptAdmissionTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ADMISSION_DATE_TIME = #{admissionDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DEPT_DISCHARGE_FROM = #{deptDischargeFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DISCHARGE_DATE_TIME = #{dischargeDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OCCUPATION = #{occupation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MARITAL_STATUS = #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IDENTITY = #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ARMED_SERVICES = #{armedServices,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DUTY = #{duty,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_IN_CONTRACT = #{unitInContract,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CHARGE_TYPE = #{chargeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WORKING_STATUS = #{workingStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
INSURANCE_TYPE = #{insuranceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
INSURANCE_NO = #{insuranceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SERVICE_AGENCY = #{serviceAgency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MAILING_ADDRESS = #{mailingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ZIP_CODE = #{zipCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NEXT_OF_KIN = #{nextOfKin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RELATIONSHIP = #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NEXT_OF_KIN_ADDR = #{nextOfKinAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NEXT_OF_KIN_ZIPCODE = #{nextOfKinZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NEXT_OF_KIN_PHONE = #{nextOfKinPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PATIENT_CLASS = #{patientClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ADMISSION_CAUSE = #{admissionCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONSULTING_DATE = #{consultingDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
PAT_ADM_CONDITION = #{patAdmCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONSULTING_DOCTOR = #{consultingDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ADMITTED_BY = #{admittedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EMER_TREAT_TIMES = #{emerTreatTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ESC_EMER_TIMES = #{escEmerTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
SPEC_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS = #{specLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FIRST_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS = #{firstLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
AUTOPSY_INDICATOR = #{autopsyIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BLOOD_TYPE = #{bloodType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BLOOD_TYPE_RH = #{bloodTypeRh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BLOOD_TRAN_TIMES = #{bloodTranTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BLOOD_TRAN_VOL = #{bloodTranVol,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BLOOD_TRAN_REACT_TIMES = #{bloodTranReactTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ALERGY_DRUGS = #{alergyDrugs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ADVERSE_REACTION_DRUGS = #{adverseReactionDrugs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MR_VALUE = #{mrValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MR_QUALITY = #{mrQuality,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FOLLOW_INDICATOR = #{followIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FOLLOW_INTERVAL = #{followInterval,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FOLLOW_INTERVAL_UNITS = #{followIntervalUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DIRECTOR = #{director,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ATTENDING_DOCTOR = #{attendingDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DOCTOR_IN_CHARGE = #{doctorInCharge,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DISCHARGE_DISPOSITION = #{dischargeDisposition,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TOTAL_COSTS = #{totalCosts,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TOTAL_PAYMENTS = #{totalPayments,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CATALOG_DATE = #{catalogDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CATALOGER = #{cataloger,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SERIOUS_COND_DAYS = #{seriousCondDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CRITICAL_COND_DAYS = #{criticalCondDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ICU_DAYS = #{icuDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CCU_DAYS = #{ccuDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
SECOND_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS = #{secondLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
INFUSION_REACT_TIMES = #{infusionReactTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DECUBITAL_ULCER_TIMES = #{decubitalUlcerTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TOP_UNIT = #{topUnit,jdbcType=CHAR},
SERVICE_SYSTEM_INDICATOR = #{serviceSystemIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
INTERNAL_NO = #{internalNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IDENTITY_CLASS = #{identityClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
HBSAG_INDICATOR = #{hbsagIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
HCV_AB_INDICATOR = #{hcvAbIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
HIV_AB_INDICATOR = #{hivAbIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
CHIEF_DOCTOR = #{chiefDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ADVANCED_STUDIES_DOCTOR = #{advancedStudiesDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRACTICE_DOCTOR_OF_GRADUATE = #{practiceDoctorOfGraduate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRACTICE_DOCTOR = #{practiceDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DOCTOR_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY = #{doctorOfControlQuality,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NURSE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY = #{nurseOfControlQuality,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DATE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY = #{dateOfControlQuality,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
FIRST_CASE_INDICATOR = #{firstCaseIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
THIRD_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS = #{thirdLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
X_EXAM_NO = #{xExamNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEDICAL_PAY_WAY = #{medicalPayWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TRAINING_INJURY_INDICATOR = #{trainingInjuryIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
NURSE_MR_COMMIT = #{nurseMrCommit,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
NURSE_MR_COMMIT_TIME = #{nurseMrCommitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ABNORMAL = #{abnormal,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIAL_VALUE_INDICATOR = #{specialValueIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MR_DESC = #{mrDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
HEIGHT = #{height,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
WEIGHT = #{weight,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
PATIENT_CONDITION = #{patientCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
HOSPITAL_CODE = #{hospitalCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ZYLSH = #{zylsh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARD_NO = #{cardNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
INFECT_INDICATOR = #{infectIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MR_INFECT_REPORT = #{mrInfectReport,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
HEALTH_LEVEL = #{healthLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SECURITY_TYPE_CODE = #{securityTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ACP_MEDINS_NAME = #{acpMedinsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DAYS_RINP_FLAG = #{daysRinpFlag,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DAYS_RINP_PUP = #{daysRinpPup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
VENT_USED_DAY = #{ventUsedDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
VENT_USED_HOUR = #{ventUsedHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
VENT_USED_MIN = #{ventUsedMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BEFORE_COMA_DAY = #{beforeComaDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BEFORE_COMA_HOUR = #{beforeComaHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BEFORE_COMA_MIN = #{beforeComaMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
AFTER_COMA_DAY = #{afterComaDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
AFTER_COMA_HOUR = #{afterComaHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
AFTER_COMA_MIN = #{afterComaMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
NWB_ADM_TYPE = #{nwbAdmType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MUL_NWB_BIR_WT = #{mulNwbBirWt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MUL_NWB_ADM_WT = #{mulNwbAdmWt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UNPANNED_READMISSION = #{unpannedReadmission,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BODY_HEIGHT = #{bodyHeight,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BODY_WEIGHT = #{bodyWeight,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
where PATIENT_ID = #{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and VISIT_ID = #{visitId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

update PAT_VISIT set DEPT_ADMISSION_TO = #{deptAdmissionTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADMISSION_DATE_TIME = #{admissionDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, DEPT_DISCHARGE_FROM = #{deptDischargeFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DISCHARGE_DATE_TIME = #{dischargeDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, OCCUPATION = #{occupation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MARITAL_STATUS = #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDENTITY = #{identity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ARMED_SERVICES = #{armedServices,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DUTY = #{duty,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNIT_IN_CONTRACT = #{unitInContract,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHARGE_TYPE = #{chargeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORKING_STATUS = #{workingStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, INSURANCE_TYPE = #{insuranceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INSURANCE_NO = #{insuranceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERVICE_AGENCY = #{serviceAgency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAILING_ADDRESS = #{mailingAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ZIP_CODE = #{zipCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NEXT_OF_KIN = #{nextOfKin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RELATIONSHIP = #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NEXT_OF_KIN_ADDR = #{nextOfKinAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NEXT_OF_KIN_ZIPCODE = #{nextOfKinZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NEXT_OF_KIN_PHONE = #{nextOfKinPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PATIENT_CLASS = #{patientClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADMISSION_CAUSE = #{admissionCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONSULTING_DATE = #{consultingDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, PAT_ADM_CONDITION = #{patAdmCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONSULTING_DOCTOR = #{consultingDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADMITTED_BY = #{admittedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMER_TREAT_TIMES = #{emerTreatTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ESC_EMER_TIMES = #{escEmerTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SPEC_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS = #{specLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, FIRST_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS = #{firstLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, AUTOPSY_INDICATOR = #{autopsyIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BLOOD_TYPE = #{bloodType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BLOOD_TYPE_RH = #{bloodTypeRh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BLOOD_TRAN_TIMES = #{bloodTranTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BLOOD_TRAN_VOL = #{bloodTranVol,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BLOOD_TRAN_REACT_TIMES = #{bloodTranReactTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ALERGY_DRUGS = #{alergyDrugs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADVERSE_REACTION_DRUGS = #{adverseReactionDrugs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MR_VALUE = #{mrValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MR_QUALITY = #{mrQuality,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FOLLOW_INDICATOR = #{followIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, FOLLOW_INTERVAL = #{followInterval,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, FOLLOW_INTERVAL_UNITS = #{followIntervalUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DIRECTOR = #{director,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ATTENDING_DOCTOR = #{attendingDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DOCTOR_IN_CHARGE = #{doctorInCharge,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DISCHARGE_DISPOSITION = #{dischargeDisposition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TOTAL_COSTS = #{totalCosts,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TOTAL_PAYMENTS = #{totalPayments,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CATALOG_DATE = #{catalogDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CATALOGER = #{cataloger,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERIOUS_COND_DAYS = #{seriousCondDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CRITICAL_COND_DAYS = #{criticalCondDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ICU_DAYS = #{icuDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CCU_DAYS = #{ccuDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SECOND_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS = #{secondLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, INFUSION_REACT_TIMES = #{infusionReactTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DECUBITAL_ULCER_TIMES = #{decubitalUlcerTimes,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TOP_UNIT = #{topUnit,jdbcType=CHAR}, SERVICE_SYSTEM_INDICATOR = #{serviceSystemIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, INTERNAL_NO = #{internalNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IDENTITY_CLASS = #{identityClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HBSAG_INDICATOR = #{hbsagIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, HCV_AB_INDICATOR = #{hcvAbIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, HIV_AB_INDICATOR = #{hivAbIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CHIEF_DOCTOR = #{chiefDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADVANCED_STUDIES_DOCTOR = #{advancedStudiesDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRACTICE_DOCTOR_OF_GRADUATE = #{practiceDoctorOfGraduate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRACTICE_DOCTOR = #{practiceDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DOCTOR_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY = #{doctorOfControlQuality,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NURSE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY = #{nurseOfControlQuality,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATE_OF_CONTROL_QUALITY = #{dateOfControlQuality,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, FIRST_CASE_INDICATOR = #{firstCaseIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, THIRD_LEVEL_NURS_DAYS = #{thirdLevelNursDays,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, X_EXAM_NO = #{xExamNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEDICAL_PAY_WAY = #{medicalPayWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRAINING_INJURY_INDICATOR = #{trainingInjuryIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NURSE_MR_COMMIT = #{nurseMrCommit,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NURSE_MR_COMMIT_TIME = #{nurseMrCommitTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ABNORMAL = #{abnormal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPECIAL_VALUE_INDICATOR = #{specialValueIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, MR_DESC = #{mrDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HEIGHT = #{height,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, WEIGHT = #{weight,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PATIENT_CONDITION = #{patientCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HOSPITAL_CODE = #{hospitalCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ZYLSH = #{zylsh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARD_NO = #{cardNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INFECT_INDICATOR = #{infectIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, MR_INFECT_REPORT = #{mrInfectReport,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HEALTH_LEVEL = #{healthLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SECURITY_TYPE_CODE = #{securityTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACP_MEDINS_NAME = #{acpMedinsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DAYS_RINP_FLAG = #{daysRinpFlag,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DAYS_RINP_PUP = #{daysRinpPup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VENT_USED_DAY = #{ventUsedDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, VENT_USED_HOUR = #{ventUsedHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, VENT_USED_MIN = #{ventUsedMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BEFORE_COMA_DAY = #{beforeComaDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BEFORE_COMA_HOUR = #{beforeComaHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BEFORE_COMA_MIN = #{beforeComaMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, AFTER_COMA_DAY = #{afterComaDay,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, AFTER_COMA_HOUR = #{afterComaHour,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, AFTER_COMA_MIN = #{afterComaMin,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NWB_ADM_TYPE = #{nwbAdmType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MUL_NWB_BIR_WT = #{mulNwbBirWt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MUL_NWB_ADM_WT = #{mulNwbAdmWt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UNPANNED_READMISSION = #{unpannedReadmission,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BODY_HEIGHT = #{bodyHeight,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, BODY_WEIGHT = #{bodyWeight,jdbcType=NUMERIC} where PATIENT_ID = #{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and VISIT_ID = #{visitId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
